_instructions: REAL-RECORD VALIDATION SLOT (level-2) - SECOND independent source, CHOSEN: UYAP judicial e-auction (maximally mechanism-independent from KAP: a forced sale where a court-appointed CURRENT appraisal is the reserve and competitive bidding sets the price). STILL PENDING - not validated. Operator steps: (1) open a REAL UYAP e-satis result for a COMPLETED real-estate auction that actually SOLD; (2) transcribe ONLY the structured non-personal fields into parser_input below (redact EVERY party/personal datum - the adapter never uses it and performs NO free-text parsing); (3) fill the null price/date/location values in expected_output from your manual audit (the deterministic taxonomy fields are pre-set = the adapter's fixed output for ANY completed UYAP real-estate auction, not a claim about a specific record); (4) set manifest.record_id + retrieval_date; (5) flip is_real_official_record AND manually_audited to true. Do NOT commit the raw auction artifact. While either flag is false this slot is PENDING and tests SKIP it. BOUNDARY (same as KAP): the operator supplies structured audited fields; the system does not scrape or parse raw UYAP text. Use a NON-identifying public announcement/ilan reference for 'ref' (never the icra dosya/case number).

manifest.notes: CHOSEN as the second independent Level-2 source (KAP frozen). Awaiting operator retrieval of a genuine UYAP COMPLETED (sold) real-estate auction result. Not validated. Reference = muhammen bedel (court CURRENT appraisal) -> realized = ihale bedeli (winning bid); mechanism=auction; reference_price_type=appraisal (a current appraisal, contrasting KAP's prior_appraisal).
